stemHtml: Frost is a deposit of ice...

options.a: With a crystalline appearance, formed when water vapour freezes directly onto a surface that has a temperature at or below 0ºC.
options.b: That is clear, occurs when water droplets freeze directly onto a surface with a temperature at or below 0°C, without regard to the dew point.
options.c: That is clear, results from the direct freezing of supercooled water droplets onto a surface with both temperature and dew point at or below 0°C.
options.d: That is formed through the direct freezing of snowflakes onto a surface with a temperature at or below 0°C.
